## Problem

What repetitive developer task should this project solve better?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the CLI behavior, prompt template, or documentation change you want.

## Example Usage

Provide a sample command or prompt flow if possible.

## Additional Context

Add relevant links, workflows, or project constraints.
